title: Fase 9 visual QA pass and final verification
description: Close out Fase 9 with an end-to-end visual and functional QA pass across the fully migrated admin panel (TASK-77..80), a basic accessibility spot-check, and the full monorepo verification. Treat gaps found here as blocking, mirroring the review discipline used to close TASK-60 and TASK-68.
acceptanceCriteria: Every admin screen (login, layout/nav, sidebar tree, content editor + all block types including Fase 8's dos-donts, users, tokens, landing settings, global history, per-page history) is reviewed in the browser for visual consistency (spacing, color, typography) after the shadcn migration
No regression in any previously-verified E2E flow across the tasks this phase touched (auth, navigation CRUD, editor autosave/publish, token reveal-once, restore)

A basic accessibility spot-check: focus states are visible on interactive elements, form inputs have associated labels, color contrast is reasonable for text/icon-only buttons (no rigorous WCAG audit required, but obvious regressions from the migration are caught)
The public documentation pages (`/docs/...`) and the Tiptap prose content are confirmed unchanged (Tailwind's reset did not leak into `.sb-public` or `editor.css`, per TASK-75's scoping)
Full monorepo fan-out is green: `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test` (serialized, per the known parallel preview-kit flake documented in the project's dev log)

steps.details: Walk every migrated screen in the browser; note and fix any inconsistency (spacing, misaligned icons, broken responsive behavior) introduced across TASK-77..80.

Re-run (via Playwright or manually) the key flows already covered by earlier tasks' own verification: login, sidebar CRUD, editor autosave/publish including dos-donts, token reveal-once, per-page restore.

Tab through the main flows checking focus visibility; confirm form inputs have labels; check icon-only buttons have `aria-label`s (a pattern already used elsewhere in this codebase, e.g. `SidebarTree`).
Compare `/docs/...` rendering and the Tiptap editable prose area before/after the migration — no visual drift from the Tailwind reset.
`pnpm lint` / `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 run test` all green.

technicalNotes: This task has no new UI to build — it's a verification gate closing Fase 9, same role TASK-74 plays for Fase 8.
